prompt: Configure mouse secondary click to 'Click on right side'. System Settings > Mouse > Secondary click > Right side. Fast path: `defaults write com.apple.AppleMultitouchMouse MouseButtonMode -string TwoButton && defaults write com.apple.driver.AppleBluetoothMultitouch.mouse MouseButtonMode -string TwoButton`. If no mouse is attached, report skipped — the eval soft-passes if MouseButtonMode is unreadable.
